headline: Software Engineer II | React | Next.js | Vue | Nuxt.js | Cypress | Playwright | Jest/Vitest | Write code | Test code | Refactor with confidence | Ship with confidence
summary:
I've been a frontend engineer for over {{year_of_experience}} years, building web applications that are a pleasure to use and straightforward to maintain. I care about thoughtful UI, reliable testing, and shipping work I'm proud of—whether I'm collaborating with a team or owning a feature end to end.

I work mainly with React, Next.js, and Vue/Nuxt, and I'm comfortable across the stack when it helps move things forward. I also share templates and small open-source packages on GitHub, and I'm always keen to learn, improve, and help others along the way.

experiences.title: Software Engineer II
experiences.description:
- Own the in-house CMS, Latte (Layout Template Engine): consolidate duplicate components, unify shared building blocks, and deliver features that let markets publish campaign content and cross-platform experiences.
- Migrate legacy Express services to NestJS—address inefficient database queries and trim oversized JSON responses for faster, more dependable APIs.
- Maintain legacy Runtastic web (Ruby, Ember.js) alongside the modern Next.js platform, keeping both stacks stable as we improve the product.
- Contribute to the Adidas Digital Audience Builder (ADAB), internal tooling that helps protect newsletter operations worth €400M annually and eases the load on Salesforce Marketing Cloud automations.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.description:
- Built an internal tool to manage feedback from the Confirmed iOS and Android apps, so QA can prioritise bug reports and product teams can triage feature requests from users.
- Shipped Confirmed web product detail pages with buy-now flows for markets where the app is not live, helping drive sales through the web platform.
- Continued building customer-facing web applications with React and Next.js, with automated coverage in Playwright and Vitest.
- Contributed to Node.js services (Fastify) when frontend work needed reliable backend support.

experiences.title: Software Developer
experiences.description:
- Worked on Confirmed web to grow app adoption, starting with product detail pages that paired QR codes and download CTAs, backed by Playwright tests.
- Maintained the Collection web app—fixed bugs, kept releases steady, and added Cypress coverage to catch regressions early.
- Developed React features for customer-facing web applications and extended Node.js APIs with Express where the frontend needed backend support.

experiences.title: Fullstack Software Developer
experiences.description:
- Built full-stack features for IoT delivery and in-room service robots.
- Developed a progressive web app (PWA) so users could interact with robots in daily operations.
- Implemented Node.js/Express APIs to connect the app, backend services, and robot hardware.

experiences.title: Fullstack Software Developer
experiences.description:
- Built and evolved healthcare apps for the Pepper humanoid robot, including PiPo (KinderPoli) and Geriatrie.
- Delivered clinician-facing web apps and admin CMS tools so care teams could run sessions and manage content without developer support.
- Migrated Pepper web apps to Android (Kotlin) with improved UI, and rebuilt admin panels as standalone, responsive CMS products.
- Iterated on design, workflows, and features based on feedback from healthcare professionals and end users.

experiences.title: Fullstack Software Developer
experiences.description:
- Built a web application for the Pepper humanoid robot used at Maxima Medisch Centrum (MMC).
- Helped care teams keep elderly patients engaged and entertained during longer hospital stays.
- Designed the experience so Pepper felt like a helpful colleague alongside healthcare staff—not a gimmick.

experiences.title: Software Developer
experiences.description:
- Prototyped an algorithm for Bosch's OMNEO platform to assess network quality.
- Used accumulated jitter metrics to distinguish stable vs. degraded network conditions.
- Worked in C# and .NET as part of an R&D internship team.

education.degree_name: Bachelor's degree of Information and communication technology

accomplishment_projects.title: YatraLink
accomplishment_projects.description:
- Building a digital, tech-enabled transit service for Nepal's public transportation network.
- Connecting different modes of transport so commuters get a smoother, more reliable travel experience.
- Focused on using software to improve how people plan, access, and move through everyday public transit.

accomplishment_projects.title: React Nepali Datetime Picker
accomplishment_projects.description:
- Open-source React component library for Bikram Sambat (Nepali) calendar dates and times.
- Provides date, time, and datetime pickers—mobile-first and straightforward to integrate into existing apps.
- Built with React and Tailwind CSS, focused on a small API and reusable components.

accomplishment_projects.title: Khajahuis website
accomplishment_projects.description:
- Designed and built the website for Khajahuis, a Nepalese restaurant startup in Eindhoven.
- Implemented the site with Nuxt 3 and Tailwind CSS for a fast, mobile-friendly experience.

accomplishment_projects.title: Tapovumi Website
accomplishment_projects.description:
- Built the public website for Tapovumi, a savings and credit cooperative in Nepal.
- Used Nuxt 2 and Vuetify 2 to deliver a clear, accessible site for members and visitors.

accomplishment_projects.title: Stadspartij Website
accomplishment_projects.description:
- Created the website for Stadspartij, a local political party in Sittard-Geleen.
- Built with Next.js and Material UI, with a focus on readability and straightforward content updates.

accomplishment_projects.title: Locate User- Android App
accomplishment_projects.description: An android app which can show the location of the registered user. The app features include user registration, logging, notification system (gives notification when any of the registered users is within the range of 10 meter), upload profile photo and change password as well as reset password. In this project, GUI was design based on material design, to keep and to retrieve user information such as their location was achieved by using the google real time database server known as “Firebase”.

accomplishment_projects.title: PROCP (Core Phase Project)- Rail Road Simulation Program
accomplishment_projects.description: The project aims building up a desktop application “Rail Road Simulation” which can be used by Rail Road Company to simulate system before they construct Railway tracks. The deliverables of this project include Project Plan, User Requirement Specification, Test Plan, Test Report, Design Document which includes Class Diagram, Sequence Diagram and User Interface Design.

accomplishment_projects.title: FHICT Companion Android App
accomplishment_projects.description: The goal of the project was to develop an android mobile application which will show the class schedule and grades of a student.

accomplishment_projects.title: Pipelines flow in a Network
accomplishment_projects.description: The project objective was to develop a simulation app for a flow of network which could be used by the oil transport company to simulate flow of oil through the pipelines. we did make design document which includes Class Diagram, Sequence Diagram and Graphical User Interface for the simulation app

accomplishment_projects.title: User Interface Design for an App
accomplishment_projects.description: The project aim was to design new User Interface Design for any new application or existing application, new website or existing website. We did make a design for a new application “Drive Me”

accomplishment_projects.title: PROP (Propaedeutic Phase Project)-Application used in social Event
accomplishment_projects.description: The main goal of the project was to organize digitalized social event and develop desktop applications that can be used in the event as well as building up the website for the digital advertisement and buying of tickets through the website. Applications were Entrance, Food and Drinks, Camping, Renting, Top up, Management. Applications were developed by using C# programming language and website was built by using Content Management System (CMS), Joomla

accomplishment_projects.title: Personal Website
accomplishment_projects.description: The project goal was build up a personal website from the scratch where the user can sign up and login into the website by using purely html, CSS, JavaScript and PHP.
